speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! Glad you stopped by — you've got great timing because this 2016 Tahoe LT just came in and it's already getting a lot of attention. Full leather interior, Bose sound system, that bulletproof 5.3L V8 with only 142,000 miles... these things run forever. Perfect family hauler that's ready to go today. args.message: Thanks for the introduction! I'm interested in the Tahoe, but I'd like to understand its history better. Can you provide more details about the ownership history, any accidents it may have been in, and maintenance records, particularly oil changes and any significant repairs?

text: Thanks for the introduction! I'm interested in the Tahoe, but I'd like to understand its history better. Can you provide more details about the ownership history, any accidents it may have been in, and maintenance records, particularly oil changes and any significant repairs?

speaker: seller

args.message:
Absolutely, great questions — I love a thorough buyer! This Tahoe came to us from a single-owner family here in the area. Clean title, no accidents reported on the Carfax, which is exactly what you want to see on a vehicle like this.

As for maintenance, this one's been dealer-serviced its whole life. We've got records showing regular oil changes every 5,000 miles like clockwork — that 5.3L loves Mobil 1 synthetic, and they kept up with it. The transmission fluid was serviced, brakes have been done, and it had a fresh set of plugs and a fuel system cleaning about 8,000 miles ago. 

Really, this is the kind of Tahoe you hope to find — not a fleet vehicle, not a rental, just a well-cared-for family SUV that's ready for its next chapter. Would you like to take it for a spin around the block? That V8 sounds beautiful when you fire it up.

Really, this is the kind of Tahoe you hope to find — not a fleet vehicle, not a rental, just a well-cared-for family SUV that's ready for its next chapter. Would you like to take it for a spin around the block? That V8 sounds beautiful when you fire it up.

speaker: buyer

args.message: I appreciate the details, but could you specify which dealer performed the servicing? Additionally, have there been any known issues or recurring problems with this vehicle that I should be aware of?

text: I appreciate the details, but could you specify which dealer performed the servicing? Additionally, have there been any known issues or recurring problems with this vehicle that I should be aware of?

speaker: seller

args.message:
Sure thing! The service records we have show it was primarily maintained at a Chevrolet dealership over in Greenville — they're a big GM dealer, very reputable. The previous owner was meticulous, which is rare to find these days.

As for known issues, honestly, this one's been a dream. No check engine lights, no warning indicators, nothing out of the ordinary. These Tahoes with the 5.3L are known for going 250,000, 300,000 miles without major issues — it's the same platform GM's been perfecting for decades. 

I'll be straight with you — the only thing I noticed when we did our inspection was a tiny bit of surface rust on some of the undercarriage hardware, but that's totally normal for any vehicle with some age on it, especially if it's seen a few winters. Nothing structural, just cosmetic. We see it on almost every trade-in.

Is there anything specific you're concerned about? I'm happy to pop the hood or put it up on the lift if you want to take a closer look. I've got nothing to hide on this one — it's a solid truck.

Is there anything specific you're concerned about? I'm happy to pop the hood or put it up on the lift if you want to take a closer look. I've got nothing to hide on this one — it's a solid truck.

speaker: seller

args.message:
Smart move getting an inspection — that's exactly what I'd recommend to anyone making a purchase like this. Shows you're serious and doing your due diligence. 

So what did they find? I'm confident it came back looking good. Like I said, this Tahoe's been well taken care of, and we stand behind our vehicles here. If you've got any questions about what's in the report, I'm happy to walk through it with you. 

In the meantime, have you had a chance to think about financing? We've got some great rates right now if you're looking to keep some cash in your pocket.
